delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and not (FSItem in ('1300','1310','1320','4000','4010') and FSItemDesc in ('F2005','F9000','None'))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and FSItem = '1310' and not coalesce(TTY,'') = '801'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set RiskTerr = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RiskTerr in ('unknown','UNKN','UNUN','WWWW','WWUS','WWUC')
update TransX set ReinLoc = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ReinLoc in ('unknown','UNKN','UNUN','WWWW','WWUS','WWUC')
Update TransX set Flex1 = c.SAPname, Flex8 = 'US' from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex2 = r.Descr, Flex7 = r.Region from TransX t inner join ReinLocs r on t.ReinLoc = r.ReinLoc where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex3 = r.Descr, Flex6 = r.Region, Flex9 = r.Region from TransX t inner join RiskTerrs r on t.RiskTerr = r.RiskTerr where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex4 = p.MajorClass, PCdesc = p.Descr, Division = p.Division, Region = p.Region, Location = p.Location, Zone = p.Zone, Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR  where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex5 = (case when BusCat = '10' then 'Insurance' else 'Reinsurance' end), Amt1 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex5 = '(Intercompany)' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP like 'F%'
update TransX set Flex4 = 'Specialty' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 like 'Specialty%'
Update TransX set Flex8 = 'Europe' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Co like '3%' or Co in ('2001','2002','2003','4100','4110'))
Update TransX set Flex8 = 'Far East' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2004','2005')
Update TransX set Flex8 = 'Canada' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2006','2310')
Update TransX set Flex8 = 'Latin America' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2007','4000','4010','4020')
Update TransX set Flex9 = Flex7 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (coalesce(Flex9,'') = '' or coalesce(Flex9,'') = 'Oth America')
Update TransX set Flex9 = Flex8 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (coalesce(Flex9,'') = '' or coalesce(Flex9,'') = 'Oth America')
Update TransX set Flex9 = 'Intl' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex9,'') in ('Africa','Oceania')
